turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good morning. I want to know if you have an MRI machine on site or if patients are sent somewhere else.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good morning! We have a fully functional 1.5 Tesla MRI machine in our radiology department. Scans can typically be scheduled within 1 to 2 days.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Great. Is there a specific preparation required before an MRI?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It depends on the body part being scanned. For abdominal MRIs, we usually ask patients to fast for 4 hours. Brain or joint scans don't generally require fasting. The technician will give you specific instructions when you book.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: And what's the rough cost for a knee MRI?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The standard rate for a knee MRI is ₹6,500. If you're using insurance, we can do a direct claim depending on your policy. Do you have insurance?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, I have Apollo Munich. Let me check if it's covered.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Apollo Munich is accepted here. When you come in, just carry your policy card and we'll help you with the claim paperwork. Anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're welcome! Have a nice day.
